rows.supercombo_notes: Slow startup, only combos naturally from the first hit of 5HK (requires Drive Rush or Punish Counter to combo from 2HP, 4HP launch, or 5HK 2nd hit); 214HK cannot frame trap when canceled from a normal (except for Burnout + Drive Rush into 2MP/2HP/5HK); combos naturally into all follow-ups including 6HK; cancel into 6HK follow-up leaves a 7f gap on block (can frame trap 4f normals in Burnout); 2f extra recovery on Perfect Parry only; if the 1st hit is Perfect Parried, 2nd hit will interrupt any punish slower than 5f startup (trades with 6f attacks); cannot perform follow-up attacks if both hits whiff; carries Counter-hit/Punish Counter advantage through both hits; can juggle after DR~4HP (easier execution but less damaging than his MP Tiger Shot juggle sequence); opponents can beat all follow-ups with invincible reversals (but standard 6f reversals will not punish 214HK)
